---
  name: Feature Request
  about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the solver
  title: '[FEATURE] '
  labels: enhancement
  assignees: ''
  ---

  ## Feature Description

  A clear description of what you want to happen.

  ## Problem It Solves

  What problem does this address? Why is it valuable for solver operators?

  ## Proposed Solution

  How would you implement it?

  ## Alternatives Considered

  Any workarounds or alternatives you have considered.

  ## Additional Context

  Any other context, mockups, or examples.
